prose:
**Ethylene frontier-orbital result** — computed with chemkit `frontier-orbitals` using DFT, tier `standard`, explicitly requested **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** in **PySCF**, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` (6 atoms); this was a frontier-orbital single-point calculation, not a geometry optimization.

Headline result: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV**.

Additional orbital quantities returned by chemkit: HOMO = -7.6155818 eV; LUMO = -0.17986527 eV. Total electronic energy = -78.623486 hartree = -2139.4541 eV. SCF converged: true, in 6 cycles. No `warnings` array was returned by the tool result. Engine integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true`.

Reproducibility: chemkit returned this CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmptyuqdr4p/live.json`. The tool result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot report one without guessing.
